title: Community
lead: LetterLab improves through feedback. If you have ideas, bugs, or suggestions, this page shows the fastest ways to contribute.

items.label: Design feedback
items.description: Share UI/UX ideas and pain points.

items.title: What makes a good bug report
body: Include steps to reproduce, what you expected, and what actually happened. Your environment (browser, OS) and whether the issue is consistent or intermittent help us fix it faster.

items.title: What makes a good feature request
body: Describe the problem you’re trying to solve and why existing options don’t work. A short example or use case helps. We prioritize clarity and impact.

items.title: Respectful communication
body: We expect constructive, respectful communication in issues and discussions. We reserve the right to moderate content that violates this.
